sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62777" key="leukwmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκ-ωμᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n62777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">good for</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λεύκωμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg003.perseus-grc1:11:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κολλούρια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.22</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
